prompts.schema:
## 表结构定义

表名: DimCustomer (客户维度表)
字段:
  - CustomerKey (客户代理键, 主键, 自增)
  - GeographyKey (地理代理键, 外键 → DimGeography.GeographyKey)
  - CustomerAlternateKey (客户业务标识, NOT NULL, 如会员编号)
  - Title (称谓, 如: Mr./Ms./Mrs.)
  - FirstName (名)
  - MiddleName (中间名)
  - LastName (姓)
  - NameStyle (姓名样式, bit类型)
  - BirthDate (出生日期, 格式: YYYY-MM-DD)
  - MaritalStatus (婚姻状态, 可选值: S-单身/M-已婚)
  - Suffix (后缀, 如: Jr./Sr.)
  - Gender (性别, 可选值: M-男/F-女)
  - EmailAddress (电子邮箱)
  - YearlyIncome (年收入, 单位: 美元, money类型)
  - TotalChildren (子女总数, tinyint类型)
  - NumberChildrenAtHome (在家子女人数, tinyint类型)
  - EnglishEducation (教育程度-英文, 可选值: Bachelors/Graduate/High School/Partial College/Partial High School)
  - SpanishEducation (教育程度-西班牙语)
  - FrenchEducation (教育程度-法语)
  - EnglishOccupation (职业-英文, 如: Professional/Management/Clerical/Skilled Manual)
  - SpanishOccupation (职业-西班牙语)
  - FrenchOccupation (职业-法语)
  - HouseOwnerFlag (房屋拥有标识, 可选值: 0/1)
  - NumberCarsOwned (拥有汽车数量, tinyint类型)
  - AddressLine1 (地址第一行)
  - AddressLine2 (地址第二行)
  - Phone (电话号码)
  - DateFirstPurchase (首次购买日期)
  - CommuteDistance (通勤距离, 如: 0-1 Miles/1-2 Miles/5-10 Miles)

示例值:
  - CustomerKey: 11000, 11001
  - FirstName: Jon, Yang
  - LastName: Yang, Zhu
  - BirthDate: 1972-01-12
  - MaritalStatus: S
  - Gender: M
  - YearlyIncome: 90000.00
  - EnglishEducation: Bachelors
  - EnglishOccupation: Professional


表名: DimDate (日期维度表)
字段:
  - DateKey (日期代理键, 主键, 格式: YYYYMMDD)
  - FullDateAlternateKey (完整日期, date类型, NOT NULL)
  - DayNumberOfWeek (星期几编号, tinyint类型, 1=周日)
  - EnglishDayNameOfWeek (星期名称-英文, 如: Monday/Tuesday)
  - SpanishDayNameOfWeek (星期名称-西班牙语)
  - FrenchDayNameOfWeek (星期名称-法语)
  - DayNumberOfMonth (月内第几天, tinyint类型)
  - DayNumberOfYear (年内第几天, smallint类型)
  - WeekNumberOfYear (年内第几周, tinyint类型)
  - EnglishMonthName (月份名称-英文, 如: January/February)
  - SpanishMonthName (月份名称-西班牙语)
  - FrenchMonthName (月份名称-法语)
  - MonthNumberOfYear (年内第几月, tinyint类型)
  - CalendarQuarter (日历季度, tinyint类型, 1-4)
  - CalendarYear (日历年, smallint类型, 如: 2014)
  - CalendarSemester (日历半年度, tinyint类型, 1-2)
  - FiscalQuarter (财务季度, tinyint类型, 1-4)
  - FiscalYear (财务年, smallint类型)
  - FiscalSemester (财务半年度, tinyint类型, 1-2)

示例值:
  - DateKey: 20140101, 20140102
  - FullDateAlternateKey: 2014-01-01
  - DayNumberOfWeek: 4
  - EnglishDayNameOfWeek: Wednesday
  - DayNumberOfMonth: 1
  - CalendarYear: 2014
  - CalendarQuarter: 1
  - FiscalYear: 2014
  - EnglishMonthName: January


表名: DimGeography (地理维度表)
字段:
  - GeographyKey (地理代理键, 主键, 自增)
  - City (城市名称)
  - StateProvinceCode (州/省编码, 如: WA/CA)
  - StateProvinceName (州/省名称)
  - CountryRegionCode (国家/地区编码, 如: US/CA/GB)
  - EnglishCountryRegionName (国家/地区名称-英文, 如: United States/Canada)
  - SpanishCountryRegionName (国家/地区名称-西班牙语)
  - FrenchCountryRegionName (国家/地区名称-法语)
  - PostalCode (邮政编码)
  - SalesTerritoryKey (销售区域代理键, 外键 → DimSalesTerritory.SalesTerritoryKey)
  - IpAddressLocator (IP地址定位)

示例值:
  - GeographyKey: 1, 2
  - City: Seattle, New York
  - StateProvinceName: Washington, New York
  - EnglishCountryRegionName: United States
  - PostalCode: 98101


表名: DimProduct (产品维度表)
字段:
  - ProductKey (产品代理键, 主键, 自增)
  - ProductAlternateKey (产品业务标识, 唯一约束(与StartDate联合))
  - ProductSubcategoryKey (产品子类别代理键, 外键 → DimProductSubcategory.ProductSubcategoryKey)
  - WeightUnitMeasureCode (重量单位编码, 如: LB/KG)
  - SizeUnitMeasureCode (尺寸单位编码, 如: CM/IN)
  - EnglishProductName (产品名称-英文, NOT NULL)
  - SpanishProductName (产品名称-西班牙语)
  - FrenchProductName (产品名称-法语)
  - StandardCost (标准成本, money类型)
  - FinishedGoodsFlag (成品标识, bit类型, 0=半成品/1=成品)
  - Color (颜色, NOT NULL, 如: Black/Red/Silver/Blue)
  - SafetyStockLevel (安全库存水平, smallint类型)
  - ReorderPoint (再订购点, smallint类型)
  - ListPrice (标价, money类型)
  - Size (尺寸, 如: M/L/XL/38/42)
  - SizeRange (尺寸范围)
  - Weight (重量, float类型)
  - DaysToManufacture (制造天数)
  - ProductLine (产品线, 如: R-公路/M-山地/T-旅行/S-标准)
  - DealerPrice (经销商价格, money类型)
  - Class (产品等级, 如: H-高/M-中/L-低)
  - Style (产品风格, 如: U-通用/W-女款/M-男款)
  - ModelName (型号名称)
  - LargePhoto (产品大图, varbinary(max)类型)
  - EnglishDescription (产品描述-英文)
  - FrenchDescription (产品描述-法语)
  - ChineseDescription (产品描述-中文)
  - ArabicDescription (产品描述-阿拉伯语)
  - HebrewDescription (产品描述-希伯来语)
  - ThaiDescription (产品描述-泰语)
  - GermanDescription (产品描述-德语)
  - JapaneseDescription (产品描述-日语)
  - TurkishDescription (产品描述-土耳其语)
  - StartDate (生效日期, datetime类型, 唯一约束(与ProductAlternateKey联合))
  - EndDate (失效日期, datetime类型)
  - Status (状态, 如: Current/Discontinued)

示例值:
  - ProductKey: 1, 2
  - EnglishProductName: Mountain-100 Silver, Road-150 Red
  - Color: Silver, Red
  - ListPrice: 3399.99, 3578.27
  - StandardCost: 1912.15, 2171.29
  - ProductLine: M, R
  - Class: H, M
  - Status: Current


表名: DimProductCategory (产品类别维度表)
字段:
  - ProductCategoryKey (产品类别代理键, 主键, 自增)
  - ProductCategoryAlternateKey (产品类别业务标识, 唯一约束)
  - EnglishProductCategoryName (产品类别名称-英文, NOT NULL, 如: Bikes/Accessories/Clothing/Components)
  - SpanishProductCategoryName (产品类别名称-西班牙语)
  - FrenchProductCategoryName (产品类别名称-法语)

示例值:
  - ProductCategoryKey: 1, 2, 3, 4
  - EnglishProductCategoryName: Bikes, Components, Clothing, Accessories


表名: DimProductSubcategory (产品子类别维度表)
字段:
  - ProductSubcategoryKey (产品子类别代理键, 主键, 自增)
  - ProductSubcategoryAlternateKey (产品子类别业务标识, 唯一约束)
  - EnglishProductSubcategoryName (产品子类别名称-英文, NOT NULL, 如: Mountain Bikes/Road Bikes/Touring Bikes)
  - SpanishProductSubcategoryName (产品子类别名称-西班牙语)
  - FrenchProductSubcategoryName (产品子类别名称-法语)
  - ProductCategoryKey (产品类别代理键, 外键 → DimProductCategory.ProductCategoryKey)

示例值:
  - ProductSubcategoryKey: 1, 2, 3
  - EnglishProductSubcategoryName: Mountain Bikes, Road Bikes, Touring Bikes
  - ProductCategoryKey: 1


表名: DimSalesTerritory (销售区域维度表)
字段:
  - SalesTerritoryKey (销售区域代理键, 主键, 自增)
  - SalesTerritoryAlternateKey (销售区域业务标识, 唯一约束)
  - SalesTerritoryRegion (销售区域名称, NOT NULL, 如: Northwest/Northeast/Central/Southwest)
  - SalesTerritoryCountry (销售区域国家, NOT NULL, 如: United States/Canada)
  - SalesTerritoryGroup (销售区域组, 如: North America/Europe/Pacific)
  - SalesTerritoryImage (销售区域图片, varbinary(max)类型)

示例值:
  - SalesTerritoryKey: 1, 2
  - SalesTerritoryRegion: Northwest, Northeast
  - SalesTerritoryCountry: United States
  - SalesTerritoryGroup: North America, Europe, Pacific


表名: DimCurrency (货币维度表)
字段:
  - CurrencyKey (货币代理键, 主键, 自增)
  - CurrencyAlternateKey (货币业务标识, NOT NULL, 如: USD/CAD/EUR/GBP/AUD)
  - CurrencyName (货币名称, NOT NULL, 如: US Dollar/Canadian Dollar/Euro)

示例值:
  - CurrencyKey: 1, 2, 3
  - CurrencyAlternateKey: USD, CAD, EUR
  - CurrencyName: US Dollar, Canadian Dollar, Euro


表名: DimPromotion (促销维度表)
字段:
  - PromotionKey (促销代理键, 主键, 自增)
  - PromotionAlternateKey (促销业务标识, 唯一约束)
  - EnglishPromotionName (促销名称-英文, 如: No Discount/Volume Discount)
  - SpanishPromotionName (促销名称-西班牙语)
  - FrenchPromotionName (促销名称-法语)
  - DiscountPct (折扣百分比, float类型, 如: 0.10 表示10%折扣)
  - EnglishPromotionType (促销类型-英文, 如: No Discount/Volume Discount/Discontinued Product)
  - SpanishPromotionType (促销类型-西班牙语)
  - FrenchPromotionType (促销类型-法语)
  - EnglishPromotionCategory (促销类别-英文, 如: No Discount/Reseller/Customer)
  - SpanishPromotionCategory (促销类别-西班牙语)
  - FrenchPromotionCategory (促销类别-法语)
  - StartDate (开始日期, datetime类型, NOT NULL)
  - EndDate (结束日期, datetime类型)
  - MinQty (最小数量)
  - MaxQty (最大数量)

示例值:
  - PromotionKey: 1, 2
  - EnglishPromotionName: No Discount, Volume Discount 11 to 14
  - DiscountPct: 0.00, 0.05
  - EnglishPromotionType: No Discount, Volume Discount
  - EnglishPromotionCategory: No Discount, Reseller


表名: DimAccount (账户维度表)
字段:
  - AccountKey (账户代理键, 主键, 自增)
  - ParentAccountKey (父账户代理键, 外键 → DimAccount.AccountKey, 自引用层级结构)
  - AccountCodeAlternateKey (账户编码业务标识)
  - ParentAccountCodeAlternateKey (父账户编码业务标识)
  - AccountDescription (账户描述)
  - AccountType (账户类型, 如: Assets/Liabilities/Revenue/Expenditures)
  - Operator (运算符, 如: +/~/None)
  - CustomMembers (自定义成员)
  - ValueType (值类型, 如: Currency/Percent/Number)
  - CustomMemberOptions (自定义成员选项)

示例值:
  - AccountKey: 1, 2
  - AccountDescription: Cash, Accounts Receivable
  - AccountType: Assets
  - Operator: +


表名: DimDepartmentGroup (部门组维度表)
字段:
  - DepartmentGroupKey (部门组代理键, 主键, 自增)
  - ParentDepartmentGroupKey (父部门组代理键, 外键 → DimDepartmentGroup.DepartmentGroupKey, 自引用层级结构)
  - DepartmentGroupName (部门组名称, 如: Corporate/Executive/Manufacturing/Sales and Marketing)

示例值:
  - DepartmentGroupKey: 1, 2
  - DepartmentGroupName: Corporate, Executive General and Administration


表名: DimEmployee (员工维度表)
字段:
  - EmployeeKey (员工代理键, 主键, 自增)
  - ParentEmployeeKey (上级员工代理键, 外键 → DimEmployee.EmployeeKey, 自引用汇报关系)
  - EmployeeNationalIDAlternateKey (员工身份证号业务标识)
  - ParentEmployeeNationalIDAlternateKey (上级员工身份证号业务标识)
  - SalesTerritoryKey (销售区域代理键, 外键 → DimSalesTerritory.SalesTerritoryKey)
  - FirstName (名, NOT NULL)
  - LastName (姓, NOT NULL)
  - MiddleName (中间名)
  - NameStyle (姓名样式, bit类型, NOT NULL)
  - Title (职位, 如: Sales Representative/Marketing Manager)
  - HireDate (入职日期)
  - BirthDate (出生日期)
  - LoginID (登录ID)
  - EmailAddress (电子邮箱)
  - Phone (电话)
  - MaritalStatus (婚姻状态, 可选值: S-单身/M-已婚)
  - EmergencyContactName (紧急联系人姓名)
  - EmergencyContactPhone (紧急联系人电话)
  - SalariedFlag (是否拿固定薪水, bit类型)
  - Gender (性别, 可选值: M-男/F-女)
  - PayFrequency (发薪频率, tinyint类型, 1=月薪/2=双周薪)
  - BaseRate (基本工资率, money类型)
  - VacationHours (年假小时数, smallint类型)
  - SickLeaveHours (病假小时数, smallint类型)
  - CurrentFlag (当前在职标识, bit类型, NOT NULL, 0=离职/1=在职)
  - SalesPersonFlag (销售人员标识, bit类型, NOT NULL, 0=非销售/1=销售)
  - DepartmentName (部门名称)
  - StartDate (入职/开始日期)
  - EndDate (离职/结束日期)
  - Status (状态, 如: Current/Inactive)
  - EmployeePhoto (员工照片, varbinary(max)类型)

示例值:
  - EmployeeKey: 1, 2
  - FirstName: Guy, Kevin
  - LastName: Gilbert, Brown
  - Title: Sales Representative, Marketing Manager
  - SalesPersonFlag: 1
  - DepartmentName: Sales, Marketing


表名: DimOrganization (组织维度表)
字段:
  - OrganizationKey (组织代理键, 主键, 自增)
  - ParentOrganizationKey (父组织代理键, 外键 → DimOrganization.OrganizationKey, 自引用层级结构)
  - PercentageOfOwnership (所有权百分比)
  - OrganizationName (组织名称)
  - CurrencyKey (货币代理键, 外键 → DimCurrency.CurrencyKey)

示例值:
  - OrganizationKey: 1, 2
  - OrganizationName: AdventureWorks Cycle, Subsidiary A
  - PercentageOfOwnership: 100%, 50%


表名: DimReseller (经销商维度表)
字段:
  - ResellerKey (经销商代理键, 主键, 自增)
  - GeographyKey (地理代理键, 外键 → DimGeography.GeographyKey)
  - ResellerAlternateKey (经销商业务标识, 唯一约束)
  - Phone (电话)
  - BusinessType (业务类型, NOT NULL, 如: Warehouse/Specialty Bike Shop/Value Added Reseller)
  - ResellerName (经销商名称, NOT NULL)
  - NumberEmployees (员工人数)
  - OrderFrequency (下单频率, 如: A-年/A-Annual/S-季/S-Seasonal)
  - OrderMonth (下单月份, tinyint类型)
  - FirstOrderYear (首次下单年份)
  - LastOrderYear (最后下单年份)
  - ProductLine (产品线)
  - AddressLine1 (地址第一行)
  - AddressLine2 (地址第二行)
  - AnnualSales (年销售额, money类型)
  - BankName (银行名称)
  - MinPaymentType (最小付款类型, tinyint类型)
  - MinPaymentAmount (最小付款金额, money类型)
  - AnnualRevenue (年收入, money类型)
  - YearOpened (开业年份)

示例值:
  - ResellerKey: 1, 2
  - ResellerName: A Bike Store, Cycling Goods
  - BusinessType: Specialty Bike Shop, Warehouse
  - AnnualSales: 800000.00


表名: DimSalesReason (销售原因维度表)
字段:
  - SalesReasonKey (销售原因代理键, 主键, 自增)
  - SalesReasonAlternateKey (销售原因业务标识, NOT NULL)
  - SalesReasonName (销售原因名称, NOT NULL, 如: Price/On Promotion/Review/Manufacturer)
  - SalesReasonReasonType (销售原因类型, NOT NULL, 如: Marketing/Other/Promotion)

示例值:
  - SalesReasonKey: 1, 2
  - SalesReasonName: Price, On Promotion
  - SalesReasonReasonType: Other, Promotion


表名: DimScenario (场景维度表)
字段:
  - ScenarioKey (场景代理键, 主键, 自增)
  - ScenarioName (场景名称, 如: Actual/Budget/Forecast)

示例值:
  - ScenarioKey: 1, 2
  - ScenarioName: Actual, Budget


表名: AdventureWorksDWBuildVersion (数据仓库版本信息表)
字段:
  - DBVersion (数据库版本号)
  - VersionDate (版本日期, datetime类型)

示例值:
  - DBVersion: 16.0.1000.6
  - VersionDate: 2020-01-15 10:30:00


表名: DatabaseLog (数据库日志表)
字段:
  - DatabaseLogID (日志ID, 主键, 自增, 非聚集主键)
  - PostTime (记录时间, datetime类型, NOT NULL)
  - DatabaseUser (数据库用户, sysname类型, NOT NULL)
  - Event (事件类型, sysname类型, NOT NULL, 如: CREATE_TABLE/ALTER_TABLE)
  - Schema (模式名, sysname类型)
  - Object (对象名, sysname类型)
  - TSQL (执行的TSQL语句, nvarchar(max)类型, NOT NULL)
  - XmlEvent (XML事件详情, xml类型, NOT NULL)

示例值:
  - DatabaseLogID: 1, 2
  - PostTime: 2020-01-15 10:30:00
  - DatabaseUser: sa
  - Event: CREATE_TABLE
  - Schema: dbo


表名: DataMartInternetSales (互联网销售数据集市表)
字段:
  - EnglishProductName (产品名称-英文)
  - EnglishProductSubcategoryName (产品子类别名称-英文)
  - EnglishProductCategoryName (产品类别名称-英文)
  - CustomerAddressLine (客户地址)
  - CustomerBirthDate (客户出生日期)
  - CustomerCommuteDistance (客户通勤距离)
  - CustomerDateFirstPurchase (客户首次购买日期)
  - CustomerEducation (客户教育程度)
  - CustomerTotalChildren (客户子女总数, tinyint类型)
  - CustomerYearlyIncome (客户年收入, money类型)
  - CustomerFirstName (客户名)
  - CustomerLastName (客户姓)
  - EnglishPromotionName (促销名称-英文)
  - EnglishPromotionCategory (促销类别-英文)
  - EnglishPromotionType (促销类型-英文)
  - DiscountPct (折扣百分比, float类型)
  - SalesTerritoryRegion (销售区域名称)
  - SalesTerritoryGroup (销售区域组)
  - SalesTerritoryCountry (销售区域国家)
  - CurrencyKey (货币代理键, NOT NULL)
  - SalesOrderNumber (销售订单号, NOT NULL)
  - SalesOrderLineNumber (销售订单行号, tinyint类型, NOT NULL)
  - RevisionNumber (修订号, tinyint类型, NOT NULL)
  - OrderQuantity (订购数量, smallint类型, NOT NULL)
  - UnitPrice (单价, money类型, NOT NULL)
  - ExtendedAmount (扩展金额, money类型, NOT NULL)
  - UnitPriceDiscountPct (单价折扣百分比, float类型, NOT NULL)
  - DiscountAmount (折扣金额, float类型, NOT NULL)
  - ProductStandardCost (产品标准成本, money类型, NOT NULL)
  - TotalProductCost (产品总成本, money类型, NOT NULL)
  - SalesAmount (销售额, money类型, NOT NULL)
  - TaxAmt (税额, money类型, NOT NULL)
  - Freight (运费, money类型, NOT NULL)
  - OrderDate (订单日期, datetime类型)
  - DueDate (到期日期, datetime类型)
  - ShipDate (发货日期, datetime类型)

示例值:
  - EnglishProductName: Mountain-100 Silver
  - EnglishProductCategoryName: Bikes
  - SalesOrderNumber: SO43697
  - SalesAmount: 3399.99
  - OrderQuantity: 1
  - CustomerFirstName: Jon


表名: FactInternetSales (互联网销售事实表)
字段:
  - ProductKey (产品代理键, NOT NULL, 外键 → DimProduct.ProductKey)
  - OrderDateKey (订单日期代理键, NOT NULL, 外键 → DimDate.DateKey)
  - DueDateKey (到期日期代理键, NOT NULL, 外键 → DimDate.DateKey)
  - ShipDateKey (发货日期代理键, NOT NULL, 外键 → DimDate.DateKey)
  - CustomerKey (客户代理键, NOT NULL, 外键 → DimCustomer.CustomerKey)
  - PromotionKey (促销代理键, NOT NULL, 外键 → DimPromotion.PromotionKey)
  - CurrencyKey (货币代理键, NOT NULL, 外键 → DimCurrency.CurrencyKey)
  - SalesTerritoryKey (销售区域代理键, NOT NULL, 外键 → DimSalesTerritory.SalesTerritoryKey)
  - SalesOrderNumber (销售订单号, 主键(联合), NOT NULL, 如: SO43697)
  - SalesOrderLineNumber (销售订单行号, 主键(联合), tinyint类型, NOT NULL)
  - RevisionNumber (修订号, tinyint类型, NOT NULL)
  - OrderQuantity (订购数量, smallint类型, NOT NULL)
  - UnitPrice (单价, money类型, NOT NULL)
  - ExtendedAmount (扩展金额, money类型, NOT NULL)
  - UnitPriceDiscountPct (单价折扣百分比, float类型, NOT NULL)
  - DiscountAmount (折扣金额, float类型, NOT NULL)
  - ProductStandardCost (产品标准成本, money类型, NOT NULL)
  - TotalProductCost (产品总成本, money类型, NOT NULL)
  - SalesAmount (销售额, money类型, NOT NULL)
  - TaxAmt (税额, money类型, NOT NULL)
  - Freight (运费, money类型, NOT NULL)
  - CarrierTrackingNumber (承运商跟踪号)
